name: ai-rag-project-root
description: Root package to run all services concurrently using Bun

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "AI-SERVICE,BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "bun run dev:ai" "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
